en.extract:
The crimson-breasted flowerpecker (Prionochilus percussus) is a bird species in the family Dicaeidae.
It is found in Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, and Thailand.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest.

The '''crimson-breasted flowerpecker''' ('''''Prionochilus percussus''''') is a [[bird]] species in the family [[Dicaeidae]].
It is found in [[Indonesia]], [[Malaysia]], [[Myanmar]], and [[Thailand]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical [[mangrove forest]].

zh.extract:
红胸锯齿啄花鸟（学名：Prionochilus percussus），是啄花鸟科锯齿啄花鸟属的一种，分布于缅甸、马来西亚、泰国和印度尼西亚。全球活动范围约为1,530,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
红胸锯齿啄花鸟的栖息地包括种植园、亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和亚热带或热带的红树林。


参考文献
Prionochilus percussus. BirdLife.org.   [2011-06-27]. （原始内容存档于2016-03-04）.
